23:16 â July 7, 2023
FX Drafts Part â Obsolete Forms
Based on the
notification from May 5, 2023
, we removed draft stock reorder information from the Payment Solutions Manual. We also removed stop payment information. You can reorder draft stock and request stop payments in FX Drafts. If the system is unavailable, please contact Convera for assistance.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
FX Drafts Part

FX Drafts Document Library
We removed the obsolete forms.
Section 8.1, Overview
We updated this section to clarify that if the FX Drafts application is unavailable, you can contact Convera. Contact details are provided in Section 1.3, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources.
Section 8.2, Manual Process for Draft Stop Payments
We removed this section.
Section 8.3, Manual Process for Desktop Draft Stock Orders
We removed this section.
